underlying_goal: Run a patrol loop: check the gt hook, create a patrol wisp if empty, execute the wisp's DAG steps, and keep looping with await-signal between cycles
friction_detail: Initial gt hook and bd mol commands failed with flag issues, and mid-session the beads-git package was externally removed breaking all bd operations.
brief_summary: User asked Deacon to start patrol loops checking the gt hook and executing patrol wisps; Claude completed 2 full cycles and detected an extraordinary event (beads-git removal) during cycle 3, escalating appropriately before halting.
